metadata.description: The Unified Operations Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

inputs.uri: https://@{parameters('EnvVar | Unified Operations Instance (hso_EnvVarUnifiedOperationsInstance)')}/data/CDSReleasedDistinctProducts?$filter=(SSTManufacturerItemNum eq '@{encodeUriComponent(triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_manufacturerpid'])}') and (SSTManufacturer eq '@{encodeUriComponent(outputs('Get_Manufacturer')?['body/hso_name'])}')&cross-company=true

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Fetching information: Article request and CDS released products  @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: GlobalProductID_txt
inputs.value: @outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_productnumberlog']

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Global Product from previous flow run detected.  Using @{variables('GlobalProductID_txt')} as Global Product ID  @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Released product found - Using @{variables('GlobalProductID_txt')} as Global Product ID  @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - No released product found - Creation of Global Product  @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: GlobalProductID_txt
inputs.value: @{first(body('List_CDS_Released_Products_[crosscompany]')?['value'])?['ProductNumber']}

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Released product found - Using @{variables('GlobalProductID_txt')} as Global Product ID  @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - No released product found - Creation of Global Product  @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: ReleasedProductSettings_str
inputs.value:
"ItemModelGroupId": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_itemmodelgroup_opt@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"TrackingDimensionGroupName": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_trackingdimensiongroup_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"PurchaseSalesTaxItemGroupCode": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_purchasetaxgroup_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"StorageDimensionGroupName": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_storagedimensiongroup_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"UnitConversionSequenceGroupId": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_unitsequencegroup_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"InventoryUnitSymbol": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_storageunit_ref_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"BOMUnitSymbol": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_storageunit_ref_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"ProductLifecycleStateId": "AKTIV",
"PurchaseUnitSymbol": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_orderunit_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"InventoryReservationHierarchyName": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_reservationhierarchy_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"ProjectCategoryId": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_projectcategory_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SalesUnitSymbol": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_orderunit_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"ProductGroupId": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_itemgroup_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SalesSalesTaxItemGroupCode": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_salestaxgroup_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SSTManufacturer": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_manufacturer_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SSTManufacturerTypeNum": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_manufacturertype']}",
"IntrastatCommodityCode":"@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_customsnumber']}",
"SSTMetalId1":"@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_metalsurchargetype1_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SSTMetalBase1":@{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalbase1_dec'],0)},
"SSTMetalQuantity1":@{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalquantity1_dec'],0)},
"SSTMetalId2":"@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_metalsurchargetype2_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SSTMetalBase2":@{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalbase2_dec'],0)},
"SSTMetalQuantity2":@{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalquantity2_dec'],0)},
"SSTMetalId3":"@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/_hso_metalsurchargetype3_id_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}",
"SSTMetalBase3":@{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalbase3_dec'],0)},
"SSTMetalQuantity3":@{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalquantity3_dec'],0)},
"SSTEplanItemNum": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_eplanarticlenumber']}",
"SSTOVHGroupId": "@{parameters('EnvVar | Articlesearch | Overhead Surcharge Group (hso_EnvVarArticlesearchOverheadSurchargeGroup)')}",
"DefaultLedgerDimensionDisplayValue": "-@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_costcenter/hso_costcenter_number_txt']}--",
"OriginCountryRegionId": "@{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_countryoforigin_id/hso_countryiso3code']}",
"SSTBasePricePurch": @{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_purchasepricecatalogue'],0)},
"PurchasePriceQuantity": @{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_pricequantity'],1)},
"UnitCost": @{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_purchasepricecatalogue'],0)},
"UnitCostQuantity": @{Coalesce(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_pricequantity'],1)},
"PurchaseLineDiscountProductGroupCode": @{if(empty(outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_surchargegroup']),string('""'),Concat(string('"'),outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_surchargegroup'],string('"')))},
"DefaultOrderType": "@{if(
equals(
    outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_defaultordertype_opt']
    ,3
   ),
'Kanban',
    if(
        equals(
        outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_defaultordertype_opt']
        ,2
        ),
        'Production',
    'Purch')
)}",
"CostGroupId": "Material",
"RawMaterialPickingPrinciple": "OrderPicking",
"FlushingPrinciple": "Finish",
"IsUnitCostAutomaticallyUpdated": "Yes"

ReleasedProductSetting_str.description: "SSTManufacturerItemNum": "will be set during released product creaton, bcc if not given GlobalProductID

inputs.name: ReleasedProductSettings_str
inputs.value:
, "SSTManualMetalSurchargeSpecification": "Yes",
"SSTMetalSurcharge": @{outputs('Fetch_Product_Requirement_Detail_[ALL_INFORMATIONS]')?['body/hso_metalsurchargepricequantity']}

inputs.name: ReleasedProductSettings_str
ReleasedProductSettings_str
inputs.value: , "SalesPriceCalculationModel": "None"

inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Start creating global product.@{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

strGlobalProductJSON

inputs.name: Log_txt
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Trade agreement processing finished successful. @{body('Process_Trade_Agreement_Journal_Lines')?['responsemsg']}@{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: strJournalNumbers
inputs.value: @{if(empty(outputs('Process_Trade_Agreement_Journal_Lines')?['Body']?['journalnumbers']),outputs('Update_Product_Requirement_Detail_Main_data_done')?['body/hso_tradeagreementjournalheader'],replace(outputs('Process_Trade_Agreement_Journal_Lines')?['Body']?['journalnumbers'],'\',''))}
